name: energy_and_fisheries_vendor_patch_harbor_ind_col
premise: A Energy and Fisheries response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving energy and fisheries vendor patch harbor ind col. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as individual vs collective under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Nadia Park
agents.identity: I am Nadia Park, accountable for a defensible call in Energy and Fisheries when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays collective for individual.

agents.name: Nadia Kaur
agents.identity: I am Nadia Kaur, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Energy and Fisheries.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so collective isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of individual.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect collective.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Nadia Park must decide under individual vs collective. What does Nadia Park do?
